name: Tipster's Choice
description: Draw 2 cards from the main deck, keep 1, return the other to the bottom

name: Corner the Market
description: Take any one face-up market stock for free (not bought: no price move, no ability)

name: Pump and Dump
description: Sell 1 stock at double its current price (still a sale: that color falls -1)

name: The Squeeze
description: Raise one stock by +2 OR lower one stock by -2

name: Wild Speculation
description: Reveal the top main-deck card and put it on the bottom; if it is a colored stock, raise or lower that color by 3 (your choice). If it has no color, reveal again

name: Preferred Bidder
description: For rest of game, when you tie the winning bid, you win

name: Hostile Takeover
description: Look at another player's hand and take 1 stock of your choice. They receive $6 from the bank

name: Rumor Mill
description: Adjust every stock by +1 or -1 (choose per stock)

name: Inside Track
description: Look at the top 2 Insider Tip cards and return them in any order

name: Wiretap
description: Look at the top 2 Insider Tip cards and return them in any order
